caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium in a room with a distinctive green, textured stone wall featuring a geometric, stepped pattern. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a light-colored Nehru vest. Two microphones are attached to the podium in front of him. Throughout the sequence, he is speaking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. Initially, he has both hands raised with palms open. As the sequence progresses, he raises his right hand and points his index finger upward while speaking. By the final scene, he has lowered his hand and is looking forward with a serious expression. Gold-colored pillars with floral arrangements are visible in the background, adding a formal architectural element to the setting. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in any of the frames.
